22 class IXMV4MeshReader : public IIXMMeshReader
23 {
24 public:
25 
27  IXMV4MeshReader(Arcane::IIOMng* io_mng,
28  Arcane::IParallelMng* parallel_mng,
29  Arcane::ITraceMng* trace_mng);
30 
32  virtual ~IXMV4MeshReader();
33 
34 public:
35 
37 
39  Arcane::String loadMeshFile(const IXMMeshFile mesh_file);
40 
42  Arcane::String meshType();
43 
45  IXMMeshDimension meshDimension();
46 
48 
49  bool hasMeshData() { return m_has_mesh_data;}
50 
51 #ifdef USE_EVOLUTIF
53  Arcane::Integer meshIncrementNumber();
54 
56  IXMMeshIncrementInfo meshIncrementInfo(const Arcane::Integer& mesh_increment_number,bool synch);
57 
59  void loadMeshIncrement(const IXMMeshIncrementInfo& mesh_increment_info, const IXMLoadInfo& load_info);
60 
62  void unloadMeshIncrement();
63 
65  bool hasTopologyIncrement() {return m_has_topology_increment;}
66  bool hasGeometryIncrement() {return m_has_geometry_increment;}
67  bool hasPropertyIncrement() {return m_has_property_increment;}
68 
70  void readCellIncrementData(IXMCellIncrementData& cell_increment_data,const IXMMeshInfo& check_mesh_info);
71  void readUpdateNodeData(IXMUpdateNodeData& update_node_data, const IXMMeshInfo& check_mesh_info);
72  void readGeometryIncrementData(IXMGeometryIncrementData& geometry_data, const IXMMeshInfo& check_mesh_info);
74  void collectiveReadGroupIncrementData(IXMGroupIncrementDataList& group_increment_data_list, ParallelUtils parallel_utils);
75  void collectiveReadPropertyIncrementData(IXMPropertyIncrementDataList& property_increment_data_list, ParallelUtils parallel_utils);
76 #endif
78 
80  void readCellData(IXMCellData& cell_data, const IXMMeshInfo& check_mesh_info);
81  void readNodeData(IXMNodeData& node_data, const IXMMeshInfo& check_mesh_info);
82 
84  void collectiveReadGroupData(IXMGroupDataList& group_data_list, ParallelUtils parallel_utils);
85  void collectiveReadPropertyData(IXMPropertyDataList& property_data_list, ParallelUtils parallel_utils);
86 
88  // Methods shared in static and evolutive mesh
89  void readFaceData(IXMFaceData& face_data,const IXMMeshInfo& check_mesh_info);
90  void readEdgeData(IXMEdgeData& edge_data,const IXMMeshInfo& check_mesh_info);
91  void readConnectionData(IXMConnectionData& connection_data);
92 
93  void readParticleData(IMesh* mesh);
94 
95  void readParticleData(ArcGeoSim::IXMTools::IXMParticleData& particle_data);
96 protected:
97 
98 #ifdef USE_EVOLUTIF
99  bool _isTopologyIncrementLoaded();
100  bool _isGeometryIncrementLoaded();
101  bool _isPropertyIncrementLoaded();
102 #endif
103  void _readCellInfos(const Arcane::XmlNodeList& cell_list_node, const String& block_name, ItemTypeMng * typeMng,
104  Arcane::Int64Array & cell_uids, Arcane::Int64Array & cell_infos,const IXMMeshInfo& check_mesh_info);
105  void _readEdgeInfos(const Arcane::XmlNodeList& edge_list_node, const String& block_name, ItemTypeMng * typeMng,
106  Arcane::Int64Array & edge_uids,Arcane::Int64Array & edge_infos,const IXMMeshInfo& check_mesh_info);
107  void _broadcastGroupData(Arcane::XmlNode& root_node, Arcane::IXmlDocumentHolder * group_holder, ParallelUtils parallel_utils, const Arcane::String& mesh_type);
108  void _broadcastGroupIds(Arcane::Int64SharedArray& group_ids, const Arcane::XmlNode& group_node, ParallelUtils parallel_utils);
109  void _readGroupIds(Arcane::Int64SharedArray& group_ids, const Arcane::XmlNode& group_ids_node, const Arcane::String& group_name);
110  void _broadcastPropertyData(Arcane::XmlNode& property_node, Arcane::IXmlDocumentHolder * property_holder, ParallelUtils parallel_utils,const Arcane::String& mesh_type);
111  void _broadcastPropertySupport(Arcane::Int64SharedArray& property_support, const Arcane::XmlNode& property_node, ParallelUtils parallel_utils);
112  void _readPropertySupport(Arcane::Int64SharedArray& property_support, const Arcane::XmlNode& support_node, const Arcane::String& property_name);
113  void _readNodeCoordUpdate(const Arcane::XmlNode& coordNode, IXMNodeData& node_data, const Arcane::String& message,const IXMMeshInfo& check_mesh_info);
114  void _readGroupData(IXMGroupData& group_data, const Arcane::XmlNode& group_node, ParallelUtils& parallel_utils);
115 
116  virtual void _readTopologyNode(Arcane::XmlNode& topology_node, const Arcane::String mesh_type);
117  virtual void _readPropertyNode(Arcane::XmlNode& property_node, const Arcane::String mesh_type);
118  virtual void _getTopologyNode(Arcane::XmlNode& root_node);
119  template<typename PropertyDataList> void _readPropertyData(PropertyDataList& property,ParallelUtils& parallel_utils);
120 
121 protected:
122 
123  // Arcane Tools
124  Arcane::IIOMng* m_io_mng = nullptr;
125  Arcane::IParallelMng* m_parallel_mng = nullptr;
126  Arcane::ITraceMng* m_trace_mng = nullptr;
127 
128  // Mesh file tools
129  Arcane::IXmlDocumentHolder * m_xmldoc = nullptr;
130 
131 #ifdef USE_EVOLUTIF
132  // Xml Data
133  IXMMeshIncrementXmlNode* m_mesh_increment_xml_node;
134 #endif
135  // Grid info
136  Arcane::String m_grid_type;
137  IXMMeshDimension m_grid_dimension;
138  IXMMeshVersion m_supported_version;
139 
140  // Increment info
141 #ifdef USE_EVOLUTIF
142  bool m_has_topology_increment = false;
143  bool m_has_geometry_increment = false;
144  bool m_has_property_increment = false;
145 #endif
146  bool m_has_mesh_data = false;
147 
148  // Event data
149  Arcane::XmlNode m_grid_root;
150  Arcane::XmlNode m_mesh_data;
151  Arcane::XmlNodeList m_events_data;
152  Integer m_nb_events_data_size = 0;
153 
154 
155  Arcane::String m_mesh_file_directory_name;
156 
157 };
158 
159 template<typename PropertyDataList>
160 void
161 ArcGeoSim::IXMV4MeshReader::
162 _readPropertyData(PropertyDataList& property_data_list,ParallelUtils& parallel_utils)
163 {
164  // Get Property node
165  Arcane::XmlNode property_node;
166  Arcane::IXmlDocumentHolder* property_holder = NULL;
167 
168  _broadcastPropertyData(property_node,property_holder,parallel_utils,PropertyDataList::mesh_type);
169  m_trace_mng->info()<<"after brodcast"<<property_holder<<" "<<PropertyDataList::mesh_type;
170 
171  // Fill property data list
172  Arcane::XmlNodeList propertyNodeList = property_node.children("property");
173  for (XmlNodeList::const_iterator iProperty = propertyNodeList.begin(); iProperty!= propertyNodeList.end(); ++iProperty)
174  {
175  typename PropertyDataList::PropertyDataType property_data;
176  property_data.name = iProperty->attrValue("name");
177  property_data.kind = iProperty->attrValue("kind");
178  // Read Support
179  Arcane::XmlNode support_node = iProperty->child("support");
180  if (!support_node.null())
181  {
182  property_data.group_name = support_node.attrValue("group-name");
183  Arcane::Int64SharedArray property_support;
184  _broadcastPropertySupport(property_support,*iProperty,parallel_utils);
185  property_data.support_and_values.item_ids = property_support;
186  }
187 
188  // Read Values
189  Arcane::XmlNodeList values_nodes = iProperty->children("values");
190  Arcane::String values_string;
191  Arcane::String format;
192  Arcane::XmlNode values_time;
193  Arcane::String type;
194  Arcane::Integer array_size;
195  property_data.data_array_size = -1;
196  for (XmlNodeList::const_iterator iValues = values_nodes.begin(); iValues != values_nodes.end(); ++iValues)
197  {
198  // Get values data string
199  values_time = iValues->attr("time");
200  XmlNode values_data = iValues->child("data");
201  format = values_data.attrValue("format");
202  // Handle data array size. Data array size is defined for each values tag. It must be the same size.
203  array_size = values_data.attr("array-size").valueAsInteger();
204  if (property_data.data_array_size == -1) property_data.data_array_size = array_size;
205  else if (array_size != property_data.data_array_size) throw IXMPropertyExceptions::InconsistentPropertyDescriptionException (
206  property_data.name,
207  "property array-size is not the same in the different values tag of the property.");
208  // Handle data type. Type is defined for each values tag. It must be the same type.
209  type = values_data.attrValue("type");
210  if (property_data.data_type.empty()) property_data.data_type = type;
211  else if (type != property_data.data_type) throw IXMPropertyExceptions::InconsistentPropertyDescriptionException (
212  property_data.name,
213  "property type is not the same in the different values tag of the property.");
214  values_string = values_data.value();
215  // Indicate values data string content : ie data array or string with data file address
216  IXMPropertyValuesData::eDataStringContent data_string_content = IXMPropertyValuesData::DataUndefined;
217  if (format == ("xml")) data_string_content = IXMTools::IXMPropertyValuesData::DataArray;
218  else if (format == ("hdf")) data_string_content = IXMTools::IXMPropertyValuesData::DataFileAddress;
219  // Create property_values_data
220  if (values_time.null()) // static mesh case
221  property_data.support_and_values.item_infos.push_back(PropertyDataList::build(values_string,data_string_content));
222  else // evolutive mesh case
223  property_data.support_and_values.item_infos.push_back(PropertyDataList::build(values_time.valueAsReal(),values_string,data_string_content));
224  }
225  property_data_list.push_back(property_data);
226  }
227 
228  delete property_holder;
229 }
230 
231 END_ARCGEOSIM_NAMESPACE
232 
233 #endif /* ARCGEOSIM_ARCGEOSIM_MESH_UTILS_IXMTOOLS_IXMV4MESHREADER_H */
